title: ornithogalum readii
intro: Ornithogalum readii, also known as the Cape star lily, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum readii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs can be dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
